name: Net Insurance S.p.A.
summary: Net Insurance S.p.A. provides insurance and reinsurance products and services in Italy. It offers insurance services in the areas of life, people, business, and financing and payment protection, as well as employee loans. The company provides its products through banks and other distributors, as well as through its Website. It serves individuals, families, and small and medium enterprises. Net Insurance S.p.A. was founded in 2000 and is based in Rome, Italy.
